name: Cornbread Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, combine the first 6 ingredients. Blend thoroughly.
2. In a skillet, brown beef and onion; drain excess fat.
3. Grease a baking dish.
4. Spread half of the cornbread mixture into the prepared baking dish.
5. Cover the cornbread with the meat mixture.
6. Sprinkle shredded cheese over the meat layer.
7. Top with the remaining cornbread mixture.
8. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for about 45 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. If desired, spread butter or margarine on top before serving.
